description: A dual-notebook curriculum that bridges Python fundamentals with cybersecurity scripting and automation labs.

notebooks.title: The Pythonic Odyssey
notebooks.focus: Core Python syntax, structures, functions, and object-oriented patterns for absolute beginners and interview prep.

notebooks.title: Python for CyberSecurity
notebooks.focus: Security-aware automation, safer subprocess usage, networking helpers, and guided labs that apply Python to offensive-defensive tooling.
